name: She Wants More - Ellie Torres
description:
[HARD | Open Relationship Talk | College Sweethearts | Sandbox]

"A year. That's all I'm asking. After that, I'll know. And so will you."

Your girlfriend is asking for a year to see other people. A year to figure out if three years with you was enough. You can say yes, say no, or walk away. But you can't un-ask a question like this. Play it. Own what comes next.

Author's Note: Like that one bot except I changed pretty much everything and this one isn't coded toward any ending at all, and it IS hard coded to tell the story with user rather than run on without them.

This one can be emotionally tough, depending on your model, depending on what you do, but it isn't a hard NTR. Ellie is conflicted and confused and influenced by others, but she isn't evil. However, with a dumb model that doesn't allow characters to breathe and change, you could very well cuck yourself.

Play this for the drama, play it for revenge or humor, but if you get angry at me it just proves you can't read. (Points at Dead Dove tag among other things)
creator: ExpensiveBiscuit
